rows.description: Solut. Scholari Saviensi
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for accurate transcription of 'Saviensi'. Both models agreed on row type and absence of monetary amounts. Visual verification confirmed 'Saviensi'.

rows.description: March Mr. Keck's Fine for the Tenement in Magdalene Parish
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for accurate description ('Keck's', 'Magdalene') and clear identification of the '¾' pence fraction, which is clearly visible in the image. gpt-5-mini missed the fraction and had minor description errors.
rows.english_description: Fine paid by Mr Keck relating to the tenement in Magdalen parish.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Fine paid by Mr Keck relating to the tenement in Magdalen parish, amounting to £2 19s 2.75d.

rows.description: Soluta varia.
rows.notes: Consensus on all fields.

rows.description: Nov: 2d Allowed to the Rector a Loss by S. Curtis late Butler & in House and Window Tax –
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for superior description accuracy, specifically 'S. Curtis' vs 'C. Curtis', '& in House' vs 'of in House', and inclusion of the trailing dash. Amounts were consistent between models.
rows.english_description: Allowance paid to the Rector for a loss caused by S. Curtis (late butler) and for house and window tax.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Allowance paid to the Rector for a loss caused by S. Curtis (late butler) and for house and window tax, amounting to £22 7s 0d.

rows.description: 3d To Mr. Bliss Beadle, Surv^r. Dues for Mids^r. 1786. See recepts varia
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Its description is accurate. Visual verification confirms the amount is 6 pounds, 4 shillings, 0 pence (06 4 0), not 6 shillings, 4 pence as gpt-5-mini incorrectly read.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Bliss, the beadle, for surveyor dues for Midsummer 1786 (referenced in receipts).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Bliss, the beadle, for surveyor dues for Midsummer 1786, amounting to £6 4s 0d.

rows.description: 8th To Davies Smith, his Bill in full
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms 'Davies Smith' (not 'Pavier Smith') and the clear '½' pence fraction, which gpt-5-mini missed.
rows.english_description: Payment in full to Davies Smith for his bill.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment in full to Davies Smith for his bill, amounting to £12 18s 5.5d.

rows.description: 16. To Thomson, Carpenter, his Bill in full
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for correctly identifying the '½' pence fraction, clearly visible in the image. Other fields were consistent.
rows.english_description: Payment in full to Mr Thomson, carpenter, for his bill.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment in full to Mr Thomson, carpenter, for his bill, amounting to £186 19s 9.5d.

rows.description: To C. Curtis, Bookseller, a Gift by Order
rows.notes: Amounts by consensus. Description from gemini-flash for 'Bookseller' and consistent capitalization ('Gift by Order'), which are visually accurate. gpt-5-mini had 'Boot seller'.
rows.english_description: Gift paid by order to C. Curtis, bookseller.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Gift paid by order to C. Curtis, bookseller, amounting to £10 0s 0d.

rows.english_description: Payment to St Michael's parish for the poor tax.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to St Michael's parish for the poor tax, amounting to £0 7s 8d.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to St Michael's parish for the gaol tax, amounting to £0 7s 8d.

rows.description: 17. To Mr. Torge, Silversmith his Bill in full

rows.description: To Mr. Lock J^r. for Knives & Forks

rows.english_description: Purchase of knives and forks from Mr Lock Jr.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Purchase of knives and forks from Mr Lock Jr., amounting to £2 7s 6d.

rows.description: 23. To Tewler, Slater, in Part

rows.english_description: Part payment to Tewler, the slater, for work.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment by order to the watchman of St Michael's parish, amounting to £0 2s 6d.

rows.notes: Amounts by consensus. Description is corrected based on visual verification: 'Brickland' from gpt-5-mini is correct, and 'Bakery Books' from gemini-flash is correct (gemini-flash had 'Brichland'). gpt-5-mini had 'Battery Books'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Padbury of Brickland for bakery books (bill).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Padbury of Brickland for bakery books (bill), amounting to £1 6s 9d.

rows.description: Carr'd up
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms 'Carr'd Up' is a label on its own line, with no associated monetary amount directly on that line. gpt-5-mini incorrectly combined this label with the total amount on a single row.

This row was added because the total amount is clearly on a separate line below 'Carr'd up' in the image. The values, including the '½' pence fraction, are accurately extracted from gemini-flash and confirmed by visual verification. gpt-5-mini included these amounts with the 'Carr'd Up' description and missed the fraction.
